emails.subject: Re: enovate appointments
emails.body: Re: enovate appointments Kay, The enovate appointment looks fine, but I made minor changes to the signature block if that is okay. The enovate appointment looks fine if Janet can still sign as Managing Director of ENA. Kay Mann 02/12/2001 12:47 PM
